name: @oneciel-ai/ciel-runtime
description: Universal AI coding-agent runtime and model-routing layer for Claude, Codex, AGY, and compatible runtimes.
author: One Ciel LLC

scripts.test: python -m py_compile ciel_runtime.py ciel_runtime_support/__init__.py ciel_runtime_support/architecture.py ciel_runtime_support/agent_router.py ciel_runtime_support/claude_router.py ciel_runtime_support/codex_cli.py ciel_runtime_support/codex_router.py ciel_runtime_support/observability.py ciel_runtime_support/transcript_filter.py ciel-runtime-menu.py ciel-runtime-tool-guard.py scripts/make_demo_assets.py && python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py"
